mapper.select: /** UsptWctTaxitmDao.checkIsUse */ select count(distinct ubts.bsns_cd) + count(distinct usts.stdr_bsns_cd) from uspt_wct_taxitm uwt left outer join uspt_bsns_taxitm_setup ubts on ubts.wct_taxitm_id = uwt.wct_taxitm_id left outer join uspt_stdr_taxitm_setup usts on usts.wct_taxitm_id = uwt.wct_taxitm_id where uwt.wct_taxitm_id = #{wctTaxitmId}
